title: Minecraft Recipe
description: A crafting, smelting, brewing, or smithing recipe for Minecraft Bedrock Edition. Recipes define how items can be created from other items using various crafting stations.

format_version.title: Format Version
format_version.description: The format version of this recipe file. Common versions include '1.12' and '1.20.10'.

oneOf.title: Shaped Recipe
oneOf.description: A shaped crafting recipe requiring ingredients in a specific pattern.

oneOf.title: Shapeless Recipe
oneOf.description: A shapeless crafting recipe allowing ingredients in any position.

oneOf.title: Furnace Recipe
oneOf.description: A smelting recipe for furnaces, blast furnaces, and smokers.

oneOf.title: Brewing Mix Recipe
oneOf.description: A brewing recipe for creating potions.

oneOf.title: Smithing Transform Recipe
oneOf.description: A smithing table recipe that transforms an item.

oneOf.title: Smithing Trim Recipe
oneOf.description: A smithing table recipe for applying armor trims.
